message:
fix(freeze): fix vstack materialization and call handling refcount issues

- Add dup check for stack/local references in both vstack materialization
  locations (materializeVStack and block terminator flush)
- Fix emitCall to properly free func and args CVs via isRefType check
- Fix emitCallMethod to properly free args, method, and this CVs
- Fix emitCallConstructor to properly free args and ctor CVs
- Remove unnecessary dup/free pattern in self-call handling

Note: GC assertion still fails - issue is in runtime/polyfills, not codegen.
Even empty JS files fail with --no-freeze, proving root cause is elsewhere.
